   - "Hey, Slavs, arise, the time has come / From the Tatra mountains, lightning glows and roars / A new morning shines on us and our homeland."

The word "Slavs" was used in the national anthem of Country B, specifically in the first line: "Hey, Slavs, arise, the time has come."
